```

	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcapsicum \
	lib/libcasper/libcasper \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \

```

--- RESPONSE ---


Looking at the working `asa` Makefile, I notice it uses `SUBDIR.${MK_TESTS}=	tests` (single `=`) while my col Makefile uses `SUBDIR.${MK_TESTS}+= tests`. Let me fix that.

ACTION: EDIT_FILE usr.bin/col/Makefile
OLD:
<<<
HAS_TESTS=
SUBDIR.${MK_TESTS}+= tests
>>>
NEW:
<<<
HAS_TESTS=
SUBDIR.${MK_TESTS}=	tests
>>>
